name: Down South Barbeque
recipeIngredient: 5 Pounds Pork roast or fresh picnic
recipeInstructions:
1. Put half of onions in the bottom of a crockpot.
2. Add meat and other ingredients with remaining onion on top.
3. Cover and cook for 8 to 12 hours on low.
4. Remove bone and fat from meat.
5. Put meat back in the crockpot.
6. Add chopped onion and barbecue sauce.
7. Cover and cook for an additional 8 to 12 hours on low, stirring 2 or 3 times.
8. Serve from the crockpot on large buns.
